resources.string: Extract AAC / H264 / H265 elementary streams from a local media file

Select a local media file, copy it into app storage, then let the native FFmpeg pipeline split supported streams and save them as standalone outputs. The current page extracts AAC with ADTS headers, plus H.264 and H.265 Annex B elementary streams.
Output format: AAC -> ADTS .aac, H264/H265 -> Annex B elementary stream
Extracted output paths and stream statistics will appear here after the task finishes.
Ready to choose a local media file for stream extraction.
Importing the selected file into app storage.
Ready to extract supported streams from: %1$s
Select a local media file first.
Extracting AAC / H264 / H265 streams from: %1$s
